D - Medicaid Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
 HEPD_MEDICARE Hepatitis D - Medicare Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
 HEPD_MEDICARE_EVER Hepatitis D - Medicare Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 HEPD_MEDICAID_EVER Hepatitis D - Medicaid Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
